video_input.reason: Red-light and vehicle crossing need temporal video evidence

helmet_scene.reason: Helmet violations must be linked with rider evidence and plate evidence

signboard_scene.condition: If traffic signs such as no-entry, no-stopping, stop sign, speed limit are detected
signboard_scene.reason: Image-only signboard evidence gives context; final challan may need tracking/manual review

uncertain_scene.condition: If scene type is not clear
uncertain_scene.reason: Unclear cases should not trigger direct enforcement

safety_rules: Do not force OCR plate number if confidence is low
Use Manual Review for uncertain evidence
Use temporal voting for video violations
Use camera calibration for stop-line and signal ROI
Do not claim framework-only modules as fully implemented
